title: Boba's Vanilla+SMP
description: This modpack is supposed to be more lightweight and lean more towards the vanilla experience, while still adding some content!
body:
This is a server modpack that leans towards being more vanilla like, but still have some of the best of modded! You also have the ability to use your own custom player models if you have created one and use them ingame! This modpack also extends the culinary and exploration, including mods like Farmer's delight, Dungeons and Taverns, and Deeper and Darker!

This modpack is intended for the Scug Squad Hangout Server, but you may use this modpack with whatever you want!
